speaker: su
text: I think that because of the FOIAs [Freedom of Information Act requests] we may have asked FDA to stop sending these weekly data mining outputs.
context: A CDC official, in November 2022 internal CDC discussion, recalled that FOIA requests were a reason CDC asked FDA to stop sharing the weekly data mining reports.
emphasis_words: I think that because of the FOIAs [Freedom of Information Act requests] we may have asked FDA to stop sending these weekly data mining outputs.
